name: QCD axion couplings from haloscope and helioscope searches
requirement: Any candidate framework predicting an axion-like particle as dark matter must respect ADMX, HAYSTAC, CAPP, and helioscope (CAST) bounds on the axion-photon coupling g_a_gamma_gamma. ADMX has excluded the QCD-axion DFSZ and KSVZ benchmark couplings in narrow mass windows from 2.66 to ~4.2 microeV.

regime.description: MicroeV-mass axion dark matter with photon coupling testable in cavity haloscopes; helioscope reaches up to keV-scale axions from solar production.

current_bound.value: ADMX: g_a_gamma_gamma < ~3e-16 GeV^-1 in the 2.66 - 4.2 microeV range, KSVZ benchmark excluded; CAST: g_a_gamma_gamma < 6.6 x 10^-11 GeV^-1 for m_a < 0.02 eV
current_bound.reference: ADMX Collaboration, 'Extended Search for the Invisible Axion with the Axion Dark Matter Experiment', PRL 124, 101303 (2020), arXiv:1910.08638; CAST Collaboration, Nature Phys. 13, 584 (2017)

what_it_excludes: Constrains QCD axion (DFSZ and KSVZ couplings) and axion-like-particle dark matter in specific mass ranges. Combined with ADMX-G2, HAYSTAC, ABRACADABRA, DMRadio, BREAD, MADMAX, and CAPP, the next decade will close most natural QCD axion parameter space from 0.1 microeV to 10 eV.

parameterization.name: Axion-photon coupling g_a_gamma_gamma in the Lagrangian L = (g_a_gamma_gamma / 4) a F F_tilde. QCD axion: g_a_gamma_gamma = (alpha / 2 pi f_a) * (E/N - 1.92), with model-dependent E/N (DFSZ: 8/3; KSVZ: 0).
parameterization.reference: Sikivie, PRL 51, 1415 (1983) (haloscope concept); GrahamGCpk, Irastorza, Lamoreaux, Lindner, van Bibber, Annu. Rev. Nucl. Part. Sci. 65, 485 (2015).
parameterization.summary: Haloscope rate = power converted from DM oscillation to photons in a tunable resonant cavity. CAST searches for solar-produced axions converting to X-rays in a magnetic field.

procedural.predicted_observable: Cavity power deposit at frequency m_a c^2 / h (haloscope) or X-ray flux from sun (helioscope).
procedural.bound_in_parameterization: QCD axion line in (m_a, g_a_gamma_gamma) plane; bounds tighten across the QCD axion band at sub-microeV to eV masses.
framework_inputs: If the framework includes a QCD axion or ALP, compute g_a_gamma_gamma at the relevant mass.
Include axion-electron and axion-nucleon couplings for non-photon channels.

primary_references.citation: ADMX Collaboration, 'Extended Search for the Invisible Axion with the Axion Dark Matter Experiment', PRL 124, 101303 (2020)
CAST Collaboration, 'New CAST Limit on the Axion-Photon Interaction', Nature Phys. 13, 584 (2017)
Irastorza and Redondo, 'New experimental approaches in the search for axion-like particles', Prog. Part. Nucl. Phys. 102, 89 (2018)
